# CLAUDE.md

Meesho fork of `ongakuer/CircleIndicator` plus the separately-vendored `imbryk/LoopingViewPager`. Three Gradle modules — `:circleindicator` (the published library), `:LoopingViewPager` (vendored), `:sample` (demo / manual regression-test app). **Active branch is `master`; `main` is stale at 2023-05.**

## NEVER DO

- **NEVER** push to `main` — `main` is frozen at 2023-05-09; all active development is on `master`. CI / JFrog publish targets `master`, so anything landed on `main` ships nothing.
- **NEVER** change `:circleindicator`'s publish coordinate away from `com.meesho.android:circle-indicator` — downstream consumers in the Meesho Android monorepo resolve that exact GAV; reverting to upstream `me.relex` breaks every consumer at dependency-resolution time.
- **NEVER** rename the Java packages `me.relex.circleindicator` or `com.imbryk.viewPager` — consumer XML layouts reference the classes by FQN (e.g. `<me.relex.circleindicator.CircleIndicator …/>`); a rename silently breaks every consumer at inflate time. The package names are part of the public ABI even though the Maven groupId is `com.meesho.android`.
- **NEVER** `git commit --no-verify` (or `--no-gpg-sign`) — bypasses the TruffleHog secret scan declared in `.pre-commit-config.yaml`; a leaked credential is committed silently.
- **NEVER** drop the `jcenter()` repository declaration in the root `build.gradle` without first proving every dependency still resolves — `legacy-support-core-ui:1.0.0` and other AGP-3.4.2-era artifacts may resolve via jcenter only. jcenter has been read-only / sunset since 2021; removing it has worked historically *because* the cache is warm.
- **NEVER** run `:circleindicator:artifactoryPublish` against the release repo from a working tree whose `versionName` resolves to `<branch>-SNAPSHOT` — `:circleindicator/build.gradle` picks `RELEASE_REPO_NAME` only when `git tag --points-at HEAD` matches `[0-9.]*[0-9]`. Tag first, then publish.
- **NEVER** bump Android Gradle Plugin past 3.4.2 in this repo without an explicit upgrade plan — the publish block, jcenter dependency, and `jvmTarget`-absent Java toolchain were all written against AGP 3.x. AGP ≥ 7 will reject the current `buildscript` / repository layout outright.

## Stack

| Concern | Choice | Where enforced |
|---|---|---|
| Build | Android Gradle Plugin **3.4.2** | root `build.gradle` `buildscript.dependencies` |
| Repositories | `google()` + `jcenter()` (sunset; cache-only) | root `build.gradle` `allprojects.repositories` |
| Publish | `com.jfrog.artifactory` + `maven-publish` | root `allprojects` block; `:circleindicator` is the only publisher |
| Versioning | Tag-driven via the `versionName()` closure | `:circleindicator/build.gradle` |
| Secret scan | TruffleHog via `pre-commit` and `pre-push` stages | `.pre-commit-config.yaml` → `pre-commit-scripts/trufflehog-hook.sh` |
| compileSdk / minSdk / targetSdk | 28 / 14 / 28 | each module's `build.gradle` |

## Source layout

| Module | Purpose | Package |
|---|---|---|
| `:circleindicator` | The published library — `CircleIndicator` (LinearLayout-backed `ViewPager` indicator) + `SnackbarBehavior`. Java only. | `me.relex.circleindicator` |
| `:LoopingViewPager` | Vendored from `imbryk/LoopingViewPager` (Apache 2.0, 2013). Not published — consumed only by `:sample`. | `com.imbryk.viewPager` |
| `:sample` | Demo / manual regression-test app. Depends on both libraries via `project(':…')`. | `me.relex.circleindicator.sample` |

## Invariants

- **Versioning is tag-driven, not file-driven.** `:circleindicator/build.gradle` defines a `versionName()` closure that shells out `git tag --points-at HEAD`. Match `[0-9.]*[0-9]` → release version + `RELEASE_REPO_NAME`; otherwise `<branch>-SNAPSHOT` + `SNAPSHOT_REPO_NAME`. Releasing therefore is: tag the commit (`git tag 2.1.4`), push the tag, run `:circleindicator:artifactoryPublish`. The hard-coded `version = "2.1.3"` line above the closure is a *fallback default* — the closure overrides it.
- **Two upstream forks coexist.** `:circleindicator` is forked from `github.com/ongakuer/CircleIndicator` (last upstream sync 1.2.2 per `CHANGELOG.md`; local at 2.1.3). `:LoopingViewPager` is forked from `imbryk/LoopingViewPager` (Apache 2.0, Copyright 2013 Leszek Mzyk). The original `me.relex.circleindicator` / `com.imbryk.viewPager` packages are preserved deliberately — they're part of the public ABI consumed by Meesho apps.
- **JFrog credentials read from project properties.** `:circleindicator/build.gradle` publish block expects `JFROG_ARTIFACTORY_URL`, `JFROG_ARTIFACTORY_USERNAME`, `JFROG_ARTIFACTORY_KEY`, `SNAPSHOT_REPO_NAME`, `RELEASE_REPO_NAME` on `project.properties`. CI injects these via `-P` flags; local publishes need them in `~/.gradle/gradle.properties`. Missing → publish task fails with a null-URL error, not a credential-error message — that distinction matters when triaging.
